# GitHub Repository Setup for OpenIdentity / AxiomID

Use this file as the canonical GitHub repository profile checklist.

## Repository Description

Portable identity, verification, capability, memory-discovery, and authorization manifests for AI agents — built for AxiomID and the agentic era.

## Website URL

- Production: `https://openidentity-md.vercel.app` after Vercel deployment.
- Fallback docs: repository README and `frontend/index.html`.

## Suggested Topics / Tags

`ai-agents`, `agent-identity`, `openidentity`, `axiomid`, `agentic-ai`, `mcp`, `a2a`, `did`, `verifiable-credentials`, `oauth2`, `openid-connect`, `wallets`, `siwe`, `caip`, `llms-txt`, `agentic-txt`, `arabic`, `bilingual`, `identity`, `trust`, `memory-discovery`

## About Section Checklist

- [ ] Add the repository description above.
- [ ] Add the deployed Vercel URL as the website.
- [ ] Add all suggested topics that fit GitHub's topic limits.
- [ ] Pin the repository in the AxiomID/OpenIdentity organization profile.
- [ ] Enable Issues for feedback and use-case requests.
- [ ] Enable Discussions for interoperability and protocol conversations.
- [ ] Enable GitHub Pages only if Vercel is not used.
- [ ] Enable Dependabot alerts and secret scanning where available.

## Branch Protection Recommendation

Protect `main` with:

- Required pull request review before merge.
- Required status checks: `Validate docs, index, and frontend`.
- Require branches to be up to date before merging.
- Block force pushes and branch deletion.

## Social Preview

Use a 1280×640 image with:

- AxiomID / OpenIdentity wordmark.
- “Identity for the agentic era.”
- Protocol badges: MCP, A2A, DID, VC, OAuth/OIDC, Wallet, agentic.txt.
- English + العربية and light/dark visual split.
